I couldn't find information about the plant Passiflora insignis, however I can provide general information about the plant genus Passiflora.

The genus Passiflora, commonly known as the passionflower, is a group of about 550 species of flowering plants. These plants are native to the Americas, with the majority found in South America and the Caribbean. They are members of the family Passifloraceae and are characterized by their unique and complex flowers, as well as their edible fruits.
